    Description
     
    Event(int _time, ServicePoint _servicePoint)
    Creates a routing event whose arrival time matches its event time.

    Creates an event whose arrival time matches its event time.

    Creates an event with an explicit original customer arrival time.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    SimulationResultRepository.save(List<ServicePoint> servicePoints, List<Integer> customerResponseTimes)
    Saves all service-point and customer response-time data in a single database transaction.

  • Uses of ServicePoint in model.serviceObjects

    Methods in model.serviceObjects that return ServicePoint
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ServicePoint
    ServicePointTree.getChild(int index)
    Gets a child node's service point by index.
    static ServicePoint
    ServicePointType.getCurrentParallel(ServicePoint service)
    Chooses the current service point or one of its parallels if available now.
    static ServicePoint
    ServicePointType.getCurrentParallel(ServicePoint service, int time)
    Chooses the current service point or one of its parallels if available at a future time.
    static ServicePoint
    ServicePointType.getNextParallel(ServicePoint service, ServicePointTree root)
    Chooses an available parallel service point under the next routed child.
    static ServicePoint
    ServicePointType.getNextService(ServicePoint service, ServicePointTree root)
    Chooses the next child router/service point using the current service point's routing table.
    ServicePoint
    ServicePointTree.getSelf()
    Gets the service point represented by this node.
    Methods in model.serviceObjects that return types with arguments of type ServicePoint
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<ServicePoint>
    ServicePointTree.getAllServicePoints()
    Gets every unique service point in this subtree, including shared tier-four services only once.

    Method
    Description

    static ServicePoint

    Chooses an available parallel service point under the next routed child.

    Description
     
    ServicePointTree(ServicePoint servicePoint, int _depth, Simulation simulation)
